title: /apf
text: /apf Appends data to an XML file. /apf Used With /cpy Description When the Target of /cpy is an XML file, use the /apf sub-switch to append the current information to the file specified (instead of overwriting the file). Note: If an XML file was originally created with $ude ("export") , it is not possible to append data to it with /cpy . Appending data to the end of an XML file can take considerable time. CAUTION: It is not possible to append data to a file that is larger than 2 GB. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
